species.citation: Gaertn. , Fruct. Sem. Pl. 1 (1788) 113 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 588; Airy Shaw, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1948) 27. = Reichelia palustris Blanco , Fl. Filip., 1st Ed. (1837) 220.
